title: Education & Academic Journey
description: Details of my academic background and milestones, where I balanced school curriculum with deep-dives into computer science and technical innovations.

items.value: Completed Grade XII (CBSE). Focused on Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Computer Science.
Actively built side projects and automated classroom schedules, bridging the gap between theory and practical software engineering.
Completed Grade X (ICSE) with exceptional performance.
Represented the school at multiple regional science fairs, tech symposiums, and debates.
Led computer application workshops for junior students, teaching them frontend fundamentals.

title: Awards & Achievements
description: Recognitions, contest wins, and major milestones achieved throughout my engineering and academic path.

items.value: Competed against thousands of participants worldwide to secure a top position by designing and presenting an innovative educational app.
This early milestone solidified my passion for coding, launching a journey into full-stack development and game engineering.
First Place in Regional STEM Exhibition for an automated weather station prototype.
Outstanding Contribution Award at St. Patrick's Academy for technical coordination of school festivals.
Top performer in national cyber olympiads throughout middle and high school.

title: Work Experiences
description: My professional experience spans leading open-source project architectures, working on premium design systems, and building AI-enabled software products.

items.value: Leading the architectural design of open-source tools tailored for agentic infrastructure.
Designing minimal developer workflows and integrations to enable flawless automation in development environments.
Collaborating on the design system structure and building high-performance UI libraries.
Integrating user feedback loop to refine UI primitives and layout structures.
Building state-of-the-art AI-enabled solutions designed to enhance learning experiences and workloads for students.

content.heading: WhiteHat Jr - Early Training & App Development

items.value: Trained intensely in mobile application frameworks (React Native) and game engine basics.
Constructed 20+ mini-games and applications, laying down strong programming foundations.
